name: Enquiry Classifier & Response Generator - n8n Cloud Mock

parameters.jsonSchemaExample: { "client_type": "Existing Client", "category": "Complaint", "urgency": "High", "confidence": 93, "summary": "Existing client reports dissatisfaction with current strata transition delays.", "recommended_actions": ["Escalate to senior consultant", "Schedule follow-up meeting", "Review transition timeline"], "historical_reference": { "similar_case_id": 1001, "previous_resolution": "Transition consultation completed successfully" }, "suggested_response": "Thank you for reaching out regarding your concerns...", "requires_human_review": false }

parameters.formDescription: Submit your inquiry and our team will respond promptly.

values.formSubmittedText: Thank you for your inquiry! Our team will review your message and respond shortly.

parameters.text:
=CURRENT INQUIRY:
Client: {{ $json.client_name }} ({{ $json.client_email }})
Building: {{ $json.building_name }} ({{ $json.building_size }} units)
Message: {{ $json.inquiry_message }}

CLIENT CONTEXT:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.client_context, null, 2) }}

SIMILAR PAST INQUIRIES (RAG):
{{ JSON.stringify($json.similar_cases, null, 2) }}

INSTRUCTIONS:
Analyze this strata consultancy inquiry and provide a structured response.

Classification Rules:
- "New Client" if client_context.client_exists is false
- "Support Request" if existing client with active projects
- "Complaint" if negative sentiment detected (dissatisfaction, unhappy, issues, problems)
- "General Question" for informational inquiries

Urgency Levels:
- "High" for complaints, urgent issues, or time-sensitive matters
- "Medium" for support requests from existing clients
- "Low" for general questions or new client inquiries

Return a JSON object with:
- client_type: "New Client" or "Existing Client"
- category: classification from rules above
- urgency: "High", "Medium", or "Low"
- confidence: 0-100 (your confidence in the classification)
- summary: brief 1-sentence summary of the inquiry
- recommended_actions: array of 2-4 specific action items for staff
- historical_reference: { similar_case_id, previous_resolution } from RAG data if relevant
- suggested_response: professional response draft for the client (2-3 paragraphs)
- requires_human_review: true if confidence < 70 or urgency is High

options.systemMessage: You are an AI operations assistant for a strata consultancy. Analyze inquiries using client context and historical data to classify, prioritize, and recommend actions. Be professional, empathetic, and leverage past successful resolutions.

parameters.content:
## 🎯 Workflow Overview

This workflow demonstrates enterprise-grade inquiry triage with:

**1. Form Capture** - Collect client details
**2. Client Lookup** - Retrieve ownership & history
**3. RAG Retrieval** - Find similar past cases
**4. AI Analysis** - Context-aware classification
**5. Smart Routing** - Escalate or auto-process

**Key Features:**
• Email-based client identification
• Historical case similarity matching
• Sentiment-based urgency detection
• Automated response generation
• Human review for high-priority cases

## n8n Cloud Demo Configuration

This version does not call external backend endpoints.

The original HTTP Request nodes have been replaced with Code nodes:

1. Lookup Client Context uses static demo client records.
2. Retrieve Similar Cases (RAG) uses static past enquiry records.

This is suitable for n8n Cloud because localhost and host.docker.internal are not reachable from n8n Cloud.

For production, replace these Code nodes with public HTTPS endpoints or a real database/RAG service.

## 🤖 AI Model Settings

**Current Configuration:**
• Model: gpt-4o-mini
• Temperature: 0.2 (low for consistent classification)
• Max Tokens: 1000

**Why Low Temperature?**
For triage/classification tasks, we want deterministic, consistent results. Temperature 0.2 ensures the AI follows classification rules strictly.

**Adjust in:** OpenAI Model node → Options → Temperature
